items.claim: Conor McGregor has a record of 22 wins, 19 KOs, one submission, and two decisions.
items.quote: So, now Conor McGregor is uh got 22 wins, 22 wins, 19 KOs, one submission, two decisions

items.claim: Conor McGregor is 1-3 in his last four fights.
items.quote: he's one and three in his last four
Max Blessed Holloway, who now is 34 years old.

items.claim: Max Holloway performs very well against southpaws.
items.quote: It seems like he does very well against southpaws.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will be physically larger than Max Holloway by approximately 6 to 8 pounds.
items.quote: He's going to be bigger than Max probably by about 6, 7, 8 lb

items.claim: Conor McGregor's punches at 170 lbs will be heavier and harder than at lower weight classes.
items.quote: the thing about Conor at 170, he's going to thump. He's going to thump. His head His punches are going to be heavy and hard.

items.claim: Max Holloway is highly experienced in high-pressure, five-round fight situations.
items.quote: He He's familiar with these high-pressure situations, and familiar recently with them.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's confidence will be lower than it was in his prime due to his recent losses and long layoff.
items.quote: Conor's confidence isn't going to be the same as it used to be.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's pressure style forces opponents to feel like they must act, allowing him to counter-strike.
items.quote: He's pressuring you, making you feel like you have to do something and he's ready to sting you.
